steps.subject: Reliable garage door vendor for your policyholders
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair in {city}. We handle a lot of garage door claims — storm damage, vehicle impact, break-in damage — and I wanted to see if you'd find it helpful to have a preferred vendor on your list.

Here's what we bring to the table for your policyholders:

- Clean, adjuster-ready estimates with photos and itemized pricing
- Same-day emergency response for securing damaged openings
- Licensed and bonded (ROC #5678)
- We work directly with adjusters to keep the process smooth

When a policyholder calls about a damaged garage door, having a vendor who knows how to document properly saves everyone time. Happy to chat about how we handle the claims process.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Garage door vendor for your policyholders
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Just following up on my last email. Wanted to give you a quick picture of how we handle insurance-related garage door work.

When a policyholder calls, we do a same-day assessment and put together a detailed estimate — photos, measurements, part numbers, labor breakdown. Your adjusters get exactly what they need without back-and-forth.

We also board up or secure the opening immediately if there's a safety concern. No one should have an unsecured garage overnight.

If you ever want to refer a policyholder our way, just have them mention your name and we'll prioritize the job.

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: Here if you need us, {first_name}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Last note from me — I won't keep bugging you. Just wanted to make sure you have my info for the next time a policyholder in {city} has garage door damage.

Same-day response, adjuster-ready documentation, licensed and bonded. Save my number and reach out whenever it comes up.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Target insurance agents with 4.0+ rating and 3+ reviews. ROC #5678 is the license number.
